creator: stb@lassitu.de
text:
Created attachment 239147
patch to update the port to 1.18.0 and add a vuxml entry

Update gitea to 1.18.0

This release fixes three security issues, a large number of bugs and contains a large number of enhancements.

See the release notes for breaking changes, among them the mail configuration, the use of U2F for authentication, and using custom templates.

Release notes: https://blog.gitea.io/2022/12/gitea-1.18.0-is-released/
